title: oplismenus burmanni f. cristatus
intro: Oplismenus burmanni f. cristatus, also known as the Hair Crested or Crested Barren Brome, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Oplismenus burmanni f. cristatus include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and cough. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions and decoctions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
